allow: PowerShell(git log --oneline -1 --all -- paper_to_markdown/pipeline.py; git show --stat HEAD -- paper_to_markdown/pipeline.py | head -20)

PowerShell(Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "Name='pythonw.exe' OR Name='python.exe'" | Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -match 'watch_runner' } | Select-Object ProcessId, Name, CommandLine | Format-List)

PowerShell(Stop-Process -Id 32400 -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Stop-Process -Id 8936 -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "Name='pythonw.exe' OR Name='python.exe'" | Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -match 'watch_runner' } | Select-Object ProcessId, CommandLine | Format-List)

PowerShell($proc = Start-Process -FilePath "E:\\YHY\\marker\\.venv\\Scripts\\pythonw.exe" -ArgumentList "-m","paper_to_markdown.watch_runner","--config","paper_to_markdown\\settings.json" -WorkingDirectory "E:\\YHY\\Paper-agent" -PassThru; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "Name='pythonw.exe' OR Name='python.exe'" | Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -match 'watch_runner' } | Select-Object ProcessId, ParentProcessId, CreationDate, CommandLine | Format-List)
Bash(awk '/Conversion completed:|Conversion failed:|Traceback|Error:/ { print strftime\("%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S"\), $0; fflush\(\); exit }')

PowerShell(Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "Name='python.exe' OR Name='pythonw.exe' OR Name='marker_single.exe'" | Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -match 'marker|watch_runner' } | Select-Object ProcessId, Name, @{N='CPU_sec';E={[math]::Round\($_.KernelModeTime/1e7 + $_.UserModeTime/1e7,1\)}}, @{N='MemMB';E={[math]::Round\($_.WorkingSetSize/1MB,0\)}}, CommandLine | Format-List)

Bash(python -c "import re; p = re.compile\(r'^\(supporting|supplementary|supplemental\)\\\\s+\(information|info|material|figures?|tables?|methods?|notes?\)\\\\b', re.IGNORECASE\); print\('match SI?:', bool\(p.search\('Supporting Information'\)\)\); print\('pattern:', p.pattern\)")

PowerShell($procs = Get-CimInstance Win32_Process | Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -match 'paper_to_markdown|watch_runner|daemon\\.py|monitor\\.py|marker_single' }; if \($procs\) { $procs | Select-Object ProcessId, Name, CommandLine | Format-List } else { Write-Output "NO_PAPER_AGENT_PROCESSES" }; Write-Output "---"; $statusFile = "e:\\YHY\\Paper-agent\\paper_to_markdown\\conversion_status.json"; if \(Test-Path $statusFile\) { Get-Content $statusFile } else { Write-Output "no conversion_status.json in paper_to_markdown" }; Write-Output "---"; if \(Test-Path "e:\\YHY\\Paper-agent\\paper_to_markdown\\settings.json"\) { \(Get-Content "e:\\YHY\\Paper-agent\\paper_to_markdown\\settings.json" -Raw\) } else { Write-Output "no settings.json \(only example\)" })
